name: Agent API Gateway
description: API Gateway for agent backends with two variants: HTTP API for request/response and SSE streaming, or WebSocket API for bidirectional streaming. Includes optional JWT auth (Cognito), custom domain, throttling, and access logging.

resources.name: HTTP API Gateway
resources.description: API Gateway v2 HTTP API with CORS configuration

resources.name: API Stage
resources.description: Auto-deploy stage with access logging and throttling

resources.name: Backend Integration
resources.description: HTTP_PROXY integration forwarding requests to your agent endpoint

resources.name: Proxy Route
resources.description: Catch-all route (ANY /{proxy+}) forwarding all paths to backend

resources.name: CloudWatch Log Group
resources.description: Access logs for API Gateway requests

parameters.name: project_name
parameters.description: Project name used for resource naming

parameters.name: backend_endpoint
parameters.description: AgentCore or backend URL to proxy requests to

parameters.name: auth_type
parameters.description: Authorization type: NONE, JWT, or AWS_IAM

parameters.name: cognito_user_pool_id
parameters.description: Cognito User Pool ID (required when auth_type=JWT)

parameters.name: cognito_app_client_id
parameters.description: Cognito App Client ID (required when auth_type=JWT)

parameters.name: custom_domain
parameters.description: Custom domain name for the API
